sources.summary: It's the romcom you know and (probably) love, this time accompanied by a live orchestra.

topics.title: Benicio Del Toro Joins Ben Stiller in Apple TV Comedy Protective Custody
topics.angle: Benicio Del Toro joins Ben Stiller in Apple TV+ comedy series 'Protective Custody'.

sources.headline: Benicio Del Toro Joins Ben Stiller in Apple TV Comedy Protective Custody
sources.summary: Benicio Del Toro is set for a lead role opposite Ben Stiller in the upcoming Apple TV comedy series Protective Custody, Variety has learned. The show was originally announced in May with Stiller attached to star and executive produce. It marks the first lead series comedy role of Del Toro s career as well as a [ ]

sources.headline: Benicio Del Toro to Star in Ben Stiller-Mike Judge Comedy Series Protective Custody at Apple TV
sources.summary: Stiller will star in and executive produce the show, which also hails from Steve Hely and Dave King.

topics.title: Engrossing British Crime Drama Gone Takes the Ol Stiff Upper Lip to New Heights

sources.headline: Engrossing British Crime Drama Gone Takes the Ol Stiff Upper Lip to New Heights
sources.summary: The new BritBox series spends six episodes continually shifting the finger of suspicion, patiently and methodically exploring themes of control, trauma, and grief. And if a character doesn't sob through it all? Even better.

topics.title: Jason Alexander Apologizes to Courtney Stodden for Filming Inappropriate Sketch When She Was Underage
topics.angle: Jason Alexander issues an apology to Courtney Stodden for filming an inappropriate sketch with her when she was underage.

sources.headline: Seinfeld Alum Jason Alexander Apologizes To Courtney Stodden For Filming Inappropriate Sketch When She Was Underage: I Truly Regret It
sources.summary: Jason Alexander is apologizing for filming a comedy sketch with then-17-year-old Courtney Stodden. Stodden recalled the 2012 Funny or Die sketch and questioned why so many adults look at a minor and decide this was acceptable. Looking back at the comedy sketch in which Ms. Stodden and I participated in 2012, I completely agree that [ ]

sources.headline: Seinfeld Actor Jason Alexander Apologizes to Courtney Stodden for Inappropriate Sketch Filmed When She Was Underage
sources.summary: In a follow-up statement shared with THR after Alexander's apology was reported, Stodden said, "I appreciate Jason Alexander’s public apology. People keep asking if he’s apologized privately, and he hasn’t. A private apology would be meaningful, but meaningful action would be even more powerful."

topics.title: Michael J. Fox: Returning to Acting Prolonged My Life
topics.angle: Michael J. Fox states that returning to acting has significantly prolonged his life while continuing his fight against Parkinson's.

sources.headline: John Mayer on Why He Keeps Quietly Funding Brain Research Studies
sources.summary: After visiting a military base where he was moved talking to wounded warriors, the rock star has spent 15 years and millions out of his own pocket backing research on PTSD and veterans health — but still finds time to make a little music.
